\begin{table*}[!t]
\caption{\textbf{Claim-bearing evidence by parent.}
RQ1 requires positive joint prediction, positive gains over both components,
and above-chance tail lift with at least 80\% coverage. RQ2 requires the
predeclared exact-energy fidelity floors, positive added value beyond
proximity, and a positive gain over the strongest simple control. RQ3 requires eight
$\Delta$NLL superiority bounds, four native-metric non-inferiority bounds, and
all-arm feasibility. \texttt{E/P} denotes eligible/pass.}
